items.title: Heavy gunfire in Somali capital as row over election delay escalates
items.dek: The opposition has called for protests after the president's term in office was extended by a year.
items.body: The opposition has called for protests after the president's term in office was extended by a year.

items.title: Robodogs and Black Hawks - How one Mexican city is preparing for the World Cup
items.dek: BBC’s Will Grant got a first-hand look at security preparations in Monterrey, as the city gets ready to host four matches.
items.body: BBC’s Will Grant got a first-hand look at security preparations in Monterrey, as the city gets ready to host four matches.
